scripts.check:pipeline:freshness: npm run check:db:ready && npm run health:pipeline:freshness --workspace api --
scripts.check:pipeline:ops: npm run check:pipeline:readiness && npm run check:pipeline:freshness
scripts.check:local:pipeline: npm run job:aggregate --workspace api && npm run job:anomaly --workspace api && npm run job:alerts --workspace api
scripts.check:prisma:migrate:deploy: npm run check:db:ready && npm run prisma:migrate --workspace api
scripts.check:prisma:migrate:status: npm run check:db:ready && npm run prisma:migrate:status --workspace api
scripts.check:release: npm run check:shared && npm run check:api:build && npm run check:prisma:validate && npm run check:prisma:migrate:deploy && npm run check:prisma:migrate:status && npm run check:api:test && npm run check:api:preflight && npm run check:api:smoke && npm run check:web:build
